math_definition: x if x>=0, a*x if x<0 where a=(lower+upper)/2 in eval mode, a~Uniform(lower,upper) in training mode. Parameters: lower (default 0.125), upper (default 1/3)

ranking_rationale: leaky_relu=identical eval-mode math structure (x if x>=0, slope*x if x<0) with single float param and v_if conditional; prelu_sfpu=same structure as leaky_relu but with learnable param (shows two-param pattern with lower+upper); dropout=PRNG initialization pattern (init_prng_seed, TTI_SFPMOV mode 8) essential for training-mode Uniform sampling; swish=best fully-implemented ckernel template with v_if conditional branches showing the correct Wave-3 kernel architecture; hardtanh=two-float-parameter dispatch pattern (_calculate_hardtanh_ with param0/param1) showing how to pass lower/upper through the LLK param interface
